message:
fix(fsqlite-vdbe): fix stale docs and add error on missing MVCC session (bd-kivg)

- Update ConcurrentContext docstring to remove stale reference to
  checking write set for reads (we removed this for savepoint compat)
- Update set_transaction_concurrent docstring similarly
- Return error in PageWriter::write_page if concurrent context exists
  but session is missing from registry (internal error, should not happen)
- Move page_data allocation after session lookup to avoid wasteful clone

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
